label: Iterable
description: Connect to Iterable to manage cross-channel messaging campaigns, users, and events via the server-side API.

form.title: Connect Iterable
form.subtitle: Paste your Iterable server-side API key to give Anton access to your messaging campaigns and user data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a server-side API key from Iterable's Integrations → API Keys panel. Quickest path — no OAuth app setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate an Iterable Server-Side API Key

1. Log in to your Iterable account at [app.iterable.com](https://app.iterable.com).
2. Navigate to **Integrations → API Keys** in the left sidebar.
3. Click **Create New API Key**.
4. Choose **Server-side** as the key type (do not use a Mobile or Web key — those have restricted scopes).
5. Give it a descriptive name like `Anton Integration` and click **Create**.
6. Copy the generated key immediately — it is shown in full only at creation time. If you lose it, you'll need to create a new one.
7. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Server-side keys have broad access (users, events, campaigns, lists). Create a dedicated key for Anton so you can revoke it independently if needed.
- Keys are project-scoped — make sure you're in the correct Iterable project before generating.
- If your account uses multiple projects, each project has its own set of API keys and a separate base URL.
- To revoke access later, return to **Integrations → API Keys**, find the key, and click **Delete**.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key

fields.description: Found in Iterable → Integrations → API Keys. Use a Server-side key type.

fields.name: base_url
